title: Fix abstraction node click expansion
description: Make collapsed subgraph/zone abstraction nodes reliably expand on click in the playground and viewer.
decision_notes: Pan/zoom pointer drag no longer starts when the pointer begins on a collapsed abstraction node.
Abstraction expansion click handling now runs in the capture phase, before inspector selection and other bubble-phase handlers can consume the event.
Inspector selection remains a normal bubble-phase click handler.
notes: Port 4174 remained served during the fix.
This is an interaction-only fix; no DSL or sample input changes were made.
